pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take:
**Mustard Boy and The Noisemaker: An Embarrassment to the Beautiful Game**

If "Mustard Boy" Zach and "The Noisemaker" Rafe had a clue between them, they wouldn't be languishing at the bottom of any table, fantasy or otherwise. Gunner, or "Bubba G," is clearly the only manager with a modicum of sense—leading the pack with 29 points by riding the coattails of powerhouse France and savvy Tier 2 picks like Senegal and Morocco. Meanwhile, Devin, aka "Ghost Pepper," is keeping pace only because Spain's been doing all the heavy lifting. Gayden, "The Backpass Assassin," is exactly what his nicknames suggest—clueless in attack and a disaster in defense, wallowing in last place. Rafe's early picks were as uninspired as a cold Tuesday night in Stoke; he might as well have thrown darts at a map and picked his teams that way. It's clear: Gunner's showing he knows international soccer, while the others are out here making choices that would make my high school team blush.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Masterclass: Gunner Secures Top Spot After Dominating Wins
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner's tactical genius questioned as he scores 7 points in a day.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Hope Hangs on Austria Against Tournament Minnow Algeria
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach banking on Austria to not let him slip further down.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gayden Poised For Redemption With England Against Panama
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden's English hopes rest on picking the right direction this time.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin Keeping It Spicy Despite Gunner's Lead
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin holds tight in the rankings after Spain's clutch victory.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner soars to first, thanks to Rafe's league-crashing chaos - sorry Bubba G!
Rafe's Tier-1 Germany debacle brings new meaning to 'draft day disaster.'
Rafe vs. Gayden: a family feud deadlocked at zero in head-to-head drama.
Sim's accuracy takes a hit: even chaos agent Rafe isn't a punchline here.
